decisions.decision: SchemaManager uses sqlite_master SQL introspection for dimension mismatch detection
decisions.rationale: Prevents runtime insertion errors by failing fast at startup

decisions.decision: VectorSearcher uses json.dumps for sqlite-vec serialization
decisions.rationale: Robust JSON format instead of fragile str.replace
